name: Merchants State Bank
description_short: Merchants State Bank is a community bank established in 1899 offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, CDs, loans, and online banking.
description_long: Merchants State Bank has operated as a hometown bank since 1899, establishing itself as a long-standing financial institution in South Dakota. The bank serves both personal and business customers through traditional banking services and modern digital channels. Their product offerings include personal loans, business loans with QuickBooks integration, certificates of deposit (CDs) with promotional rates, checking and savings accounts, and online/mobile banking platforms. The bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community banking heritage, QuickBooks integration for business customers seeking accounting software compatibility, and free eStatements for paperless banking. The institution operates with a routing number of 091402277 and maintains at least one branch location in Viborg, South Dakota with standard business hours. Merchants State Bank represents a traditional community bank model focused on personalized service and local relationships rather than a fintech or neobank approach, making it suitable for customers who prefer in-person banking relationships and established institutional stability. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
pros: Established heritage since 1899 with long-term institutional stability and community presence
QuickBooks integration for business customers to streamline accounting and loan management
Free eStatements offering paperless, convenient account management
Online banking website and mobile app available for remote account access
Competitive CD specials promoted on homepage
Personal and business loan options available with dedicated inquiry process
Physical branch location with accessible customer service via 866.228.9747 phone line
cons: Limited branch locations visible (only Viborg branch hours prominently displayed)
No specific information about account minimums, overdraft fees, or pricing structure available on website
Website does not display current interest rates, APY rates, or CD special terms in accessible format
Limited transparency regarding loan approval criteria or terms
No mention of FDIC insurance or regulatory details on provided pages
best_for: Small business owners seeking QuickBooks-integrated banking and lending solutions
South Dakota residents preferring traditional community banking relationships
Customers wanting established bank stability with 125+ year operating history
Individuals and businesses seeking personalized customer service over digital-only banking
diagnosis: Merchants State Bank is best for South Dakota customers and small business owners who value established community banking relationships and need integrated business banking services. Primary caveat is the lack of transparent pricing information and limited visible branch network, requiring direct contact for rate quotes and service details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
